# EffectLab

> A curated showcase of visual effects for React projects. Browse, preview, and copy production-ready effect components.

EffectLab collects stunning visual effects (glows, orbs, gradients, borders, animations) that designers and developers can preview live in the browser and copy directly into their projects. Each effect is a self-contained React component with zero or minimal dependencies.

## Available Effects

- [Apple Intelligence Glow](/llms-full.txt): Animated conic-gradient border glow inspired by Apple Intelligence UI
- [Siri Orb](/llms-full.txt): Animated Siri-style orb with layered conic gradients
- [Rainbow Glow Border](/llms-full.txt): Animated rainbow border with hover interaction

## How to Use

Each effect includes:
- A live preview component (React)
- TSX source code (copy-paste ready)
- CSS keyframes/properties (if needed)
- Dependency list
- Tags and keywords for discoverability

## Technical Details

- Framework: React 19 + Next.js 16
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4
- Animation: CSS @property + @keyframes (zero JS for most effects)
- All effects are self-contained and framework-agnostic (works in any React project)

## Full Documentation

For complete effect details including source code, see: /llms-full.txt
